title: What's Next for HarborCare Circle
summary: A look ahead at where this resource is headed, and an open invitation to help shape it.
author: HarborCare Circle Editorial
seoTitle: What's Next for HarborCare Circle | HarborCare Circle
metaDescription: A look ahead at where this resource is headed, and an open invitation to help shape it.
whatYouNeedToKnow: The free website and its tools continue to expand.
The app, still in development, aims to extend — not replace — what's already useful here.
Feedback from real families continues to shape what gets built next.

paragraphs: The free resource hub will keep growing — more articles, more checklists, more conditions and transitions covered — regardless of anything else in development, since that free value was always the starting point, not a placeholder for something else.

The planned app extends specific pain points already identified here — shared task tracking, document storage, deeper after-loss support — built based on what real families using this site have described needing most.

nextSteps: Keep using and returning to the free resources, which will keep expanding.
Join the waitlist if the app's direction sounds useful for your situation.
Share feedback — it genuinely shapes what gets built next.
disclaimer: Reflects current plans, which may evolve based on what families continue to need.
